title: Love in the Rain
original_title: ฤดูที่ฉันเหงา
overview: One would think it's impossible for a person to get a haircut everyday, however, Nara a young high school girl, visits the hair salon on a daily basis because she is head over heels in love with Dasie the hairdresser.
